zh.lifeSummary: 當Owen ap Gruffudd於大約1400年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，他的父親Gruffudd ap Nicolas25歲，母親Mrs. Mabli Dwnn2歲。他於大約1424年與Catrin verch Dafydd ap Rhys在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利結婚。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owen ap Gruffudd于大约1400年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾时，他的父亲Gruffudd ap Nicolas25岁，母亲Mrs. Mabli Dwnn2岁。他于大约1424年与Catrin verch Dafydd ap Rhys在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利结婚。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Owen ap Gruffudd was born about 1400, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffudd ap Nicolas, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. Mabli Dwnn, was 2. He married Catrin verch Dafydd ap Rhys about 1424, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owen ap Gruffudd est né environ 1400, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffudd ap Nicolas, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Mabli Dwnn, avait 2 ans. Il a épousé Catrin verch Dafydd ap Rhys environ 1424, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owen ap Gruffudd è nato il circa 1400 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffudd ap Nicolas, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Mabli Dwnn, aveva 2 anni. Lui sposato Catrin verch Dafydd ap Rhys circa 1424, nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Owen ap Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Nicolas(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Mabli Dwnn(은)는 2세였다. 그는 대략 1424년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 Catrin verch Dafydd ap Rhys(와)과 결혼했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owen ap Gruffudd родился около 1400 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Nicolas было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Mabli Dwnn, 2. Он женился на женщине по имени Catrin verch Dafydd ap Rhys около 1424 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
